name: sims-pro
description: SIMS Pro – School Information Management System

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx ts-node --require tsconfig-paths/register prisma/seed/seed.ts
scripts.db:reset: cd backend && npx prisma migrate reset --force && npm run db:seed
scripts.docker:dev: cd docker && docker compose --profile dev up --build -d
